commit.message:
fix: add comprehensive API response normalizer for Python backend compatibility

The Python backend returns snake_case field names while the frontend expects
camelCase. Rather than fixing each endpoint individually, this adds a central
normalizeApiResponse() function applied to ALL JSON responses from request(),
login(), and register().

Normalizations applied:
- User: name→firstName/lastName, is_admin→isAdmin, tier→subscriptionTier,
  created_at→createdAt, updated_at→updatedAt
- Project: user_id→userId, journey_type→journeyType, journey_progress→
  journeyProgress, analysis_results→analysisResults, is_paid→isPaid,
  payment_status→paymentStatus, record_count→recordCount
- Dataset: source_type→sourceType, original_file_name→originalFileName,
  ingestion_metadata→ingestionMetadata, sample_data→sampleData
- Pagination: total_count→totalCount, total_pages→totalPages

Also sends both camelCase and snake_case in register request body so
both Python and Node.js backends can parse user registration.

Removes duplicate login-specific normalization (now handled generically).

perf: add 23 missing DB indexes + fix N+1 in listTopics

Schema: add indexes to 17 tables that were missing them — every table
with a userId column now has an index on it, plus foreign-key columns
used in JOINs/WHERE (topicId, projectId, pathId, taskId, sourceId,
status, etc.).

listTopics: replace N+1 pattern (1 query per topic to count notes and
collect tags) with a single GROUP BY query using group_concat. Reduces
Turso round-trips from O(N) to O(1).

Production Turso: indexes applied via scripts/db/create-indexes.mjs.

commit.message:
fix: refresh now updates reservation details + add missing Notes in planner page

Two bugs fixed:
1. allReservations was a static prop that never updated on refresh. Now stored
   as liveReservations state that gets updated with fresh SEM data, so product
   notes, persons, and other details are reflected in the UI after refresh.
2. Planner page.tsx was missing Notes field in product mapping — products were
   loaded from SEM without their Notes, so product notes never showed up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix admin user seed: upsert role and password on every startup

Previously if the email was already registered (e.g. via sign-up form),
the seed skipped it — leaving the account as role=customer. Now it always
updates role=admin and syncs the password from ADMIN_PASSWORD env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve login failure, WebSocket 403 spam, and health check 404

Three issues from manual testing with Python backend:

1. Auth response mapping (api.ts):
   Python backend returns {name, is_admin, tier} but frontend expects
   {firstName, lastName, isAdmin, subscriptionTier}. Added normalization
   layer in login() that maps snake_case/Python fields to camelCase.
   Fixes: "Authentication succeeded but no user data received"

2. WebSocket reconnection spam (realtime.ts):
   WS was reconnecting endlessly on 403 (no auth token before login).
   Now skips reconnection when no token is available and auto-connects
   via 'auth-token-stored' event after successful login.
   Fixes: Repeated "connection rejected (403 Forbidden)" in backend logs

3. Health check endpoint (ServiceHealthBanner.tsx):
   Was calling /api/system/health (→ /system/health on Python backend)
   which returns 404. Changed to /api/health (→ /health) matching
   Python backend's actual endpoint. Added catch fallback.
   Fixes: "/system/health 404 Not Found" in backend logs

commit.message:
perf(focus): add DB index + merge duplicate queries + optimize rangeStats

- Add composite index (user_id, started_at) on activity_sessions — all
  focus queries were doing full table scans on 7k+ rows
- Merge dailyStats + dailySessions into single dailyFull endpoint —
  dashboard and focus page were running identical DB queries twice
- Optimize rangeStats: select only needed columns (was fetching all 22
  columns including aiSummary/visibleApps), single-pass day bucketing
  instead of calling buildDailyStats() N times on the same array
- Production Turso index applied and verified

Add new posts: 회계관리, TAT, FAT, 재경관리사 자격증 가이드

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(daemon): remove redundant text_final that caused duplicate output

The daemon sent a text_final carrying the full response text right
before marking the task complete. The SSE stream then delivered both
the text_final (full text) and the done event (totalText) — causing
the UI to display the full response twice in quick succession.

Remove text_final entirely; the done event's totalText already serves
as the canonical final correction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(daemon): replace polling with SSE for token streaming

  server pushes delta/done/error events as they arrive, eliminating
  ~3.3 HTTP requests/sec per active chat
- use-daemon-chat: consume SSE via fetch+ReadableStream instead of
  setInterval polling; supports AbortController for clean cancellation
- Also deduplicates the auth/no-auth code paths in tokens route

commit.message:
fix: use faster-whisper default VAD params

Custom VAD params (min_silence_duration_ms=500) were too aggressive,
causing more missed content than no VAD at all. Reverting to defaults
(min_silence_duration_ms=2000, speech_pad_ms=400) per maintainer guidance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix test suite and startup — 8 infrastructure repairs, 2373 tests green

- conftest.py: fix syntax error (broken partial comment), switch to AINDY.* prefixes; add root conftest.py
- pytest.ini: add repo root (..) to pythonpath; wire TEST_MODE, DATABASE_URL, SKIP_MONGO_PING, OPENAI_API_KEY env vars
- config.py: use Path(__file__).parent / '.env' so .env loads regardless of cwd
- auth_service.py: revert AINDY.config → config (production startup requires AINDY/ on sys.path)
- test_auth_api.py: filter memory by content instead of ordering (async latency-spike memory polluted desc().first())
- async_job_service.py: respect execute_inline_in_test_mode=False even when SQLAlchemy 2.0 can't detect SQLite via session.bind
- event_bus.py: add 1s socket timeout + circuit breaker (disable after 3 Redis failures); auth test time 104s → 20s
- worker/__init__.py: move worker.py content in — new worker/ package shadowed worker.py, breaking import worker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix product update failing + supplier name live sync everywhere

Backend: strip nested supplier/relation fields from product PUT body
so Prisma no longer rejects the update (the included supplier object
was being passed directly to prisma.update causing an error).

Frontend: purchase invoice list and view now resolve supplier name
from live SupplierContext (supplier?.name) instead of the stale stored
supplierName string, so renames reflect immediately everywhere.

Add raw SQL prefix search for admin user list

Replaces Prisma ILIKE with a ranked CTE query for instant prefix
matching on name/nameZh/email. Search bypasses the data cache for
responsiveness. Extracts search normalization into a shared module with
tests. Refactors UserSearch to receive filter state as props from the
shell (single useQueryStates owner). Adds profile search indexes.
